disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period - CBC
updates.body_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period CBC
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大邮轮接触汉坦病毒者完成隔离。

updates.title_en: CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as All 18 Americans from the Cruise Ship Return Home Safely - Medical Daily
updates.body_en: CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as All 18 Americans from the Cruise Ship Return Home Safely Medical Daily
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒响应，18名美国人安全返家。

updates.title_en: Experts: Hantavirus detected in Tierra del Fuego, but no link to cruise outbreak - Buenos Aires Times
updates.body_en: Experts: Hantavirus detected in Tierra del Fuego, but no link to cruise outbreak Buenos Aires Times
updates.summary_zh: 专家称火地岛检出汉坦病毒，但与邮轮疫情无关。

updates.title_en: Bend doctor on hantavirus ship released from quarantine - bendbulletin.com
updates.body_en: Bend doctor on hantavirus ship released from quarantine bendbulletin.com
updates.summary_zh: 本德医生结束汉坦病毒邮轮隔离。

updates.title_en: Yukon hantavirus cruise ship passenger discharged from B.C. hospital, still recovering - Yukon News
updates.body_en: Yukon hantavirus cruise ship passenger discharged from B.C. hospital, still recovering Yukon News
updates.summary_zh: 育空汉坦病毒邮轮乘客从BC省医院出院，仍在康复。

updates.title_en: Global Hantavirus Response To End On July 2: WHO - Health and Me
updates.body_en: Global Hantavirus Response To End On July 2: WHO Health and Me
updates.summary_zh: WHO宣布全球汉坦病毒应对将于7月2日结束。

updates.title_en: CDC concludes response to hantavirus outbreak on cruise - upi.com
updates.body_en: CDC concludes response to hantavirus outbreak on cruise upi.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC结束对邮轮汉坦病毒爆发的应对。

updates.title_en: US public health agency concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases - Al Jazeera
updates.body_en: US public health agency concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: 美国公共卫生机构结束汉坦病毒应对，疫情缓解。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO - NDTV
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO NDTV
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布汉坦病毒疫情将于7月2日正式结束。

updates.title_en: US CDC concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases - Reuters
updates.body_en: US CDC concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒应急响应，疫情缓解。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National - Global News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National Global News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大34人汉坦病毒自我隔离结束。

updates.title_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes - WSJ
updates.body_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes WSJ
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒响应，疫情风险降低。

updates.title_en: CDC ends US Hantavirus response - The Hill
updates.body_en: CDC ends US Hantavirus response The Hill
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒应急响应。

updates.title_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称若无新病例，汉坦病毒疫情将于7月2日宣布结束。

updates.title_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes - AJMC
updates.body_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes AJMC
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 正式结束汉坦病毒响应，疫情风险消退。

updates.title_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship - CIDRAP
updates.body_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship CIDRAP
updates.summary_zh: 国际公共卫生响应帮助控制荷兰邮轮上的汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska - The Guardian
updates.body_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: 美国内布拉斯加州汉坦病毒隔离结束，美国人被隔离六周。
